title: Watch this 100x developer use Codex… it’s insane
summary: David Ondrej features a demonstration of Pietro Schirano using Codex, an AI coding assistant, highlighting exceptional productivity gains. The video promotes learning AI-driven development and references MagicPath and Scale Software.
